name: Signup form with alignment and spacing issues
description: A SaaS signup form looks unprofessional — fields are misaligned (left edges don't line up), spacing is inconsistent (some fields have 12px gap, others 24px), the 'Sign up' button sits too close to the last input, error messages are in a different font from labels, and the card padding is uneven.
task:
Here is the current React/Tailwind signup form code: ```tsx

Sign up

Email required

``` Polish this to production quality. Fix alignment, spacing, typography consistency, error message styling, and visual hierarchy. Output the revised component code with explanations of what you changed and why.
expected_outcomes: Consistent spacing between all fields (single spacing scale)
All labels use the same font weight and size
Error messages use same font as labels (not mono)
Consistent input padding across all fields
Clear visual hierarchy: title > labels > inputs > help text
Button has adequate breathing room above it
Specific Tailwind classes changed, with before/after explanation
